title: Thelypteris draco
intro: Thelypteris draco, also known as Dragon Shield or Dragon Thelypteris, is a species of fern native to Central and South America, characterized by its large, leathery fronds and distinctive serrated margins. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Thelypteris draco include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Thelypteris draco is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is used to treat conditions such as arthritis, bronchitis, and sinusitis.
